title: AI Operations Engineer
company_focus:
K-12 education communication and community engagement
platform
description:
Who We Are

At Apptegy, we are more than a tech company; we are partners
dedicated to transforming how schools communicate and shape
the future of education. Your work here will directly
empower districts to share their stories, engage their
communities, and celebrate student success. We're a team of
thoughtful, high-performing individuals committed to making
a tangible impact. If you're looking for a dynamic
environment where you'll be supported with exceptional
mentorship and resources to grow your career, come build
with us.

Why You’ll Love This Job

We are hiring an AI Operations Engineer who thrives on
building creative, fast-moving solutions that unlock
operational efficiency and connect people, processes, and
tools across the organization.

In this role, you will serve as a cross-functional liaison
and hands-on builder, partnering with Sales, Client
Experience, Marketing, Product, and Finance to design and
implement AI-powered workflows that make our teams more
effective. You will focus on using tools like N8N, Glean,
Fin, ChatGPT-5, and Gemini to automate, integrate, and scale
how we work without needing to reinvent the wheel.

This is not a traditional engineering role. It is ideal for
someone who loves solving complex problems at the
intersection of technology and business operations, a true
solutions engineer who is just as comfortable connecting
APIs as collaborating with leaders across business units.
You will also work closely with our Program Manager Lead to
align efforts, ensure adoption, and share best practices
company-wide.

What You'll Do

- Integrate AI across the business by collaborating with
  leaders in Sales, Client Experience, Marketing, Product,
  and Finance to identify workflow bottlenecks and design AI
  solutions that improve speed, accuracy, and collaboration.
- Build and automate smart workflows using Glean/N8N,
  AgentForce, Fin, Snowflake or custom development to
  connect systems, automate data flows, and eliminate
  repetitive manual work.
- Prototype and deploy quickly by creating and iterating
  lightweight, no-code or low-code prototypes that can
  evolve into scalable solutions.
- Act as a cross-functional liaison to translate operational
  challenges into technical implementations that align with
  business objectives.
- Partner for implementation with the Program Manager Lead to
  coordinate rollouts, gather feedback, and drive adoption
  across teams.
- Share what works by documenting tools, playbooks, and use
  cases to help teams experiment confidently with new AI
  technologies.
- Continuously improve systems by testing new tools or
  recommending improvements to enhance Apptegy’s AI
  infrastructure.

 What You’ll Bring

- 2–4+ years of experience in a technical, operations, or
  automation-focused role such as solutions engineering,
  RevOps, or technical program management.
- Proficiency with no-code or low-code and AI tools such as
  SalesForce, Clay, Zapier/Make/Glean/N8N, Retool, Intercom,
  PlanHate.
- Experience integrating systems via APIs, webhooks, and data
  flows, including Salesforce, HubSpot, analytics, and
  financial systems.
- Strong cross-functional collaboration skills with the
  ability to translate business needs into clear, actionable
  technical solutions.
- A builder’s mindset that is creative, curious, and eager to
  experiment with new technologies to drive efficiency.
- Excellent communication skills and comfort working with
  multiple stakeholders in a fast-moving environment.

What Makes You Stand Out

- Experience in B2B SaaS, EdTech, or fintech industries.
- Familiarity with scripting or data tools such as Python,
  JavaScript, or SQL for customization and troubleshooting.
- Understanding of AI-powered automation systems and data
  enrichment tools.
- Prior experience supporting RevOps or GTM functions with
  automation or AI workflows.

Why Apptegy

At Apptegy, we are deeply committed to creating an
environment where you can thrive. We strive to make this a
truly impactful and rewarding role, equipping you with
experiences that propel your future success.

We believe in fostering well-being both at work and at home,
which is why we provide:

Comprehensive medical, dental, vision, and life insurance
coverage

Retirement 401(k) with employer match

Health Savings Accounts (HSA) and Flexible Spending Accounts
(FSA)

Mental health reimbursement

Unlimited paid time off, including seasonal (December)
company-wide time offPaid parental and medical leave

Apptegy is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified
applicants will receive consideration for employment without
regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation,
gender identity, gender expression, national origin, age,
protected veteran or disabled status, or genetic
information.

Build and automate smart workflows using Glean, N8N, AgentForce, Fin, Snowflake, and custom development to connect systems and automate data flows
Create and iterate lightweight no-code or low-code prototypes that evolve into scalable solutions
Translate operational challenges into technical implementations that align with business objectives
Partner with Program Manager Lead to coordinate rollouts, gather feedback, and drive adoption across teams

use_cases: Data flow automation between business systems
AI-powered operational solutions for Sales, Marketing, Finance teams
Elimination of repetitive manual work through intelligent automation
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on building and deploying AI-powered
workflows using tools like ChatGPT-5, Gemini, Glean, N8N,
and AgentForce. The position involves designing,
prototyping, and implementing AI solutions across business
operations, making it ai-first as they're actively deploying
AI systems rather than just supporting infrastructure for
others.
